MessageKey.name: AQ
MessageKey.description: Criminal History Record Additional Information Query

MessageKey.name: AR
MessageKey.description: Criminal History Record Additional Information Response

MessageKey.name: ECNS
MessageKey.description: Supervised Release Supplemental Fraudulent Data Entry

MessageKey.name: ENS
MessageKey.description: Wanted Person Fraudulent Identifiers Supplemental Entry

MessageKey.name: QWI
MessageKey.description: Combined Wanted Person and Criminal History Existence Query

MessageKey.name: XCNS
MessageKey.description: Supervised Release Supplemental Fraudulent Data Cancel

MessageKey.name: XNS
MessageKey.description: Wanted Person Fraudulent Identifiers Supplemental Cancel

MessageKey.name: ZR
MessageKey.description: Criminal History Record Request Administrative Query

Field.name: NCICNumber
Field.description: A number assigned by the NCIC computer to each NCIC record

Field.name: OriginatingAgencyCaseNumber
Field.description: The entering agencys master case file number for a record

Field.name: OriginatingAgencyORI
Field.description: A number assigned by NCIC to identify an agency

Field.name: DentalCharacteristics
Field.description: coded dental characteristics for each tooth

Field.name: DentalModelsAvailableIndicator
Field.description: indicates whether dental models are available for inspection

Field.name: DentalXraysAvailableIndicator
Field.description: indicates whether xrays are available for inspection

Field.name: DentistRemarks
Field.description: freetext dentists remarks about dental information

Field.name: NCICNumber
Field.description: A number assigned by the NCIC computer to each NCIC record

Field.name: OriginatingAgencyCaseNumber
Field.description: The entering agencys master case file number for a record

Field.name: OriginatingAgencyORI
Field.description: A number assigned by NCIC to identify an agency

Field.name: DentalCharacteristics
Field.description: coded dental characteristics for each tooth

Field.name: DentalModelsAvailableIndicator
Field.description: indicates whether dental models are available for inspection

Field.name: DentalXraysAvailableIndicator
Field.description: indicates whether xrays are available for inspection

Field.name: DentistRemarks
Field.description: freetext dentists remarks about dental information

Field.name: ModifiedOriginatingAgencyORI
Field.description: A number assigned by NCIC to identify an agency

Field.name: NCICNumber
Field.description: A number assigned by the NCIC computer to each NCIC record

Field.name: OriginatingAgencyCaseNumber
Field.description: The entering agencys master case file number for a record

Field.name: OriginatingAgencyORI
Field.description: A number assigned by NCIC to identify an agency

Field.name: NCICNumber
Field.description: A number assigned by the NCIC computer to each NCIC record

Field.name: OriginatingAgencyCaseNumber
Field.description: The entering agencys master case file number for a record

Field.name: OriginatingAgencyORI
Field.description: A number assigned by NCIC to identify an agency

Field.name: PersonRecordRemovalReason
Field.description: reason why this record was removed

Field.name: ClearDate
Field.description: date in which the record was cleared

Field.name: ContrabandRecoveredValue
Field.description: Fair market value (in whole dollars) of the item when it was recovered

Field.name: HitResultsIndicator
Field.description: Hit results, see NCC code manual

Field.name: NCICNumber
Field.description: A number assigned by the NCIC computer to each NCIC record

Field.name: OriginatingAgencyCaseNumber
Field.description: The entering agencys master case file number for a record

Field.name: OriginatingAgencyORI
Field.description: A number assigned by NCIC to identify an agency

Field.name: OtherRecoveredPropertyValue
Field.description: Fair market value (in whole dollars) of the item recovered in addition to the item that is the subject of the record

Field.name: PersonRecordRemovalReason
Field.description: reason why this record was removed

Field.name: PropertyRecoveredValue
Field.description: Fair market value (in whole dollars) of the item when it was recovered

Field.name: RecoveringAgencyCaseNumber
Field.description: The master case record of the recovering, locating or clearing agency

Field.name: RecoveringAgencyORI
Field.description: The NCIC assigned (ORI) number of the agency that recovers the stolen/lost item

Field.name: HitResultsIndicator
Field.description: Wanted Missing Person Hit Results Code

Field.name: NCICNumber
Field.description: A number assigned by the NCIC computer to each NCIC record

Field.name: CancellationDate
Field.description: date in which the record was cancelled

Field.name: NCICNumber
Field.description: A number assigned by the NCIC computer to each NCIC record

Field.name: OriginatingAgencyCaseNumber
Field.description: The entering agencys master case file number for a record

Field.name: OriginatingAgencyORI
Field.description: A number assigned by NCIC to identify an agency

Field.name: ClearDate
Field.description: date in which the record was cancelled

Field.name: NCICNumber
Field.description: A number assigned by the NCIC computer to each NCIC record

Field.name: OriginatingAgencyCaseNumber
Field.description: The entering agencys master case file number for a record

Field.name: OriginatingAgencyORI
Field.description: A number assigned by NCIC to identify an agency

Field.name: NCICNumber
Field.description: A number assigned by the NCIC computer to each NCIC record

Field.name: OriginatingAgencyCaseNumber
Field.description: The entering agencys master case file number for a record

Field.name: OriginatingAgencyORI
Field.description: A number assigned by NCIC to identify an agency

Field.name: NCICNumber
Field.description: A number assigned by the NCIC computer to each NCIC record

Field.name: OriginatingAgencyCaseNumber
Field.description: The entering agencys master case file number for a record

Field.name: OriginatingAgencyORI
Field.description: A number assigned by NCIC to identify an agency

Field.name: ArrestingAgencyORI
Field.description: A number assigned by NCIC to identify the arresting agency.

Field.name: CautionIndicator
Field.description: Caution indicates special handling of this person.

Field.name: CautionMedicalConditionsCode
Field.description: Caution indicates special handling of this person.

Field.name: FBINumber
Field.description: A number assigned by the FBI to its criminal history records.

Field.name: FraudulentBirthDate
Field.description: Date of Birth on Fraudulent or fraudulent identification document known to be used by the subject.

Field.name: FraudulentMiscellaneousNumber
Field.description: A supplemental identification number issued to a person by a governmental entity that is on a Fraudulent or fraudulent document known to be used by the subject.

Field.name: FraudulentName
Field.description: Name on Fraudulent or fraudulent identification document know to be used by the subject.

Field.name: FraudulentOperatorLicenseNumber
Field.description: Driver's license number on the Fraudulent or fraudulent identification document known to be used by the subject.

Field.name: FraudulentOperatorLicenseYear
Field.description: The year the Fraudulent driver's license expires.

Field.name: FraudulentSocialSecurityNumber
Field.description: The person's Fraudulent Social Security System identification number.

Field.name: IncarcerationPlace
Field.description: The institution where the supervised person was incarcerated.

Field.name: LicensePlateStateCode
Field.description: A code for the state, province, or country which issues a license plate.

Field.name: LicensePlateTypeCode
Field.description: A code which shows the type of use generally expected of a particular licensed vehicle.

Field.name: LicensePlateYear
Field.description: The year a vehicle registration expires; or, if not currently registered, the year it expired or the highest year which the license plate is valid.

Field.name: MiscellaneousDescriptiveText
Field.description: A free text field used to further describe this record.

Field.name: MiscellaneousNumber
Field.description: A supplemental identification number issued to the person by a governmental entity.

Field.name: Name
Field.description: The name of the person associated to this record.

Field.name: OperatorLicenseNumber
Field.description: An field used as a personal identifier number denoting the person's drivers license number.

Field.name: OperatorLicenseYear
Field.description: The year the driver's license expires.

Field.name: OriginalOffenseCode
Field.description: The offense code describes the original offense which caused one or more subsequent arrest warrants to be issued.

Field.name: OriginatingAgencyCaseNumber
Field.description: The entering agency's master case file number for a record.

Field.name: OriginatingAgencyORI
Field.description: A number assigned by NCIC to identify an agency.

Field.name: RaceCode
Field.description: The race or ethnicity that most closely describes the person.

Field.name: ScarsMarksTattoosCode
Field.description: Unusual physical characteristics of the person.

Field.name: SocialSecurityNumber
Field.description: The person's Social Security System identification number.

Field.name: VehicleColorCode
Field.description: The color or colors of a vehicle.

Field.name: VehicleIdentificationNumber
Field.description: The manufacturer's assigned vehicle identification number which conforms to published criteria.

Field.name: VehicleMakeCode
Field.description: The brand or manufacturer's name of a vehicle.

Field.name: VehicleMakeCodeDescription
Field.description: The Description of the brand or manufacturer's name of a vehicle.

Field.name: VehicleModelCode
Field.description: The particular model of a vehicle.

Field.name: VehicleStyleCode
Field.description: The body style of a vehicle.

Field.name: VehicleYear
Field.description: The model year of a vehicle.

Field.name: WarrantNumber
Field.description: The identification number of the arrest warrant for which the person is wanted.

Field.name: FraudulentName
Field.description: The Fraudulent name of the person associated to this record.

Field.name: MiscellaneousNumber
Field.description: A supplemental identification number issued to the person by a governmental entity.

Field.name: OperatorLicenseNumber
Field.description: An field used as a personal identifier number denoting the person's drivers license number.

Field.name: OperatorLicenseYear
Field.description: The year the driver's license expires.

Field.name: OriginatingAgencyCaseNumber
Field.description: The entering agency's master case file number for a record.

Field.name: OriginatingAgencyORI
Field.description: A number assigned by NCIC to identify an agency.

Field.name: SocialSecurityNumber
Field.description: The person's Social Security System identification number.

Field.name: FraudulentName
Field.description: The Fraudulent name of the person associated to this record.

Field.name: MiscellaneousNumber
Field.description: A supplemental identification number issued to the person by a governmental entity.

Field.name: OperatorLicenseNumber
Field.description: An field used as a personal identifier number denoting the person's drivers license number.

Field.name: OperatorLicenseYear
Field.description: The year the driver's license expires.

Field.description: The entering agency's master case file number for a record.

Field.name: OriginatingAgencyORI
Field.description: A number assigned by NCIC to identify an agency.

Field.name: SocialSecurityNumber
Field.description: The person's Social Security System identification number.

Field.name: ArrestingAgencyORI
Field.description: A number assigned by NCIC to identify the arresting agency.

Field.name: CautionIndicator
Field.description: Caution indicates special handling of this person.

Field.name: CautionMedicalConditionsCode
Field.description: Caution indicates special handling of this person.

Field.name: ClearVehicleDataIndicator
Field.description: Clear vehicle data from the record? (Y/N)

Field.name: FBINumber
Field.description: A number assigned by the FBI to its criminal history records.

Field.name: FraudulentBirthDate
Field.description: Date of Birth on Fraudulent or fraudulent identification document known to be used by the subject.

Field.description: A supplemental identification number issued to a person by a governmental entity that is on a Fraudulent or fraudulent document known to be used by the subject.

Field.description: The year the Fraudulent driver's license expires.

Field.description: The institution where the supervised person was incarcerated.

Field.description: A code for the state, province, or country which issues a license plate.

Field.name: LicensePlateTypeCode
Field.description: A code which shows the type of use generally expected of a particular licensed vehicle.

Field.name: LicensePlateYear
Field.description: The year a vehicle registration expires; or, if not currently registered, the year it expired or the highest year which the license plate is valid.

Field.description: A free text field used to further describe this record.

Field.description: A number assigned by NCIC to identify an agency; modified value

Field.name: NCICNumber
Field.description: A number assigned by the NCIC computer to each NCIC record

Field.name: OriginatingAgencyCaseNumber
Field.description: The entering agencys master case file number for a record

Field.name: OriginatingAgencyORI
Field.description: A number assigned by NCIC to identify an agency

Field.name: NCICNumber
Field.description: A number assigned by the NCIC computer to each NCIC record

Field.name: OriginatingAgencyCaseNumber
Field.description: The entering agencys master case file number for a record

Field.name: OriginatingAgencyORI
Field.description: A number assigned by NCIC to identify an agency

Field.name: LinkageAgencyIdentifier
Field.description: Valid ORI of the agency to which the case is linked. Interfield Dependency LKI positions 1-7 cannot be same as LKA positions 1-7. NOTE: If LKI is entered, LKA must be entered. They can be modified individually, but they must be deleted together.

Field.name: LinkageCaseNumber
Field.description: Used to link related records from different cases, in the same department, different department or different agency. LKA will be the OCA of the related record. NOTE: If LKA is entered, LKI must be entered. They can be modified individually, but they must be deleted together.

Field.name: MedicalExaminerAgencyAndCaseNumber
Field.description: Medical Examiner Agency And Case Number

Field.name: MiscellaneousDescriptiveText
Field.description: A free text field used to further describe this record.

Field.name: NotifyOriginatingAgencyIndicator
Field.description: Flag entered by the originating agency. Notifies entering agency of all "hit" transactions. Shall be one of the following: Y Yes or N No Default value of N

Field.name: OriginatingAgencyCaseNumber
Field.description: The entering agency's master case file number for a record.

Field.name: OriginatingAgencyORI
Field.description: A number assigned by NCIC to identify an agency.

Field.name: RaceCode
Field.description: The race or ethnicity that most closely describes the person.

Field.name: ScarsMarksTattoosCode
Field.description: Unusual physical characteristics of the person.

Field.name: LinkageAgencyIdentifier
Field.description: Valid ORI of the agency to which the case is linked. Interfield Dependency LKI positions 1-7 cannot be same as LKA positions 1-7. NOTE: If LKI is entered, LKA must be entered. They can be modified individually, but they must be deleted together.

Field.name: LinkageCaseNumber
Field.description: Used to link related records from different cases, in the same department, different department or different agency. LKA will be the OCA of the related record. NOTE: If LKA is entered, LKI must be entered. They can be modified individually, but they must be deleted together.

Field.name: MedicalExaminerAgencyAndCaseNumber
Field.description: Medical Examiner Agency And Case Number

Field.name: MiscellaneousDescriptiveText
Field.description: A free text field used to further describe this record.

Field.name: NotifyOriginatingAgencyIndicator
Field.description: Flag entered by the originating agency. Notifies entering agency of all "hit" transactions. Shall be one of the following: Y Yes or N No Default value of N

Field.description: The entering agency's master case file number for a record.

Field.description: Case number associated with the detainer

Field.description: Case number associated with the detainer

Field.description: A number assigned by NCIC to identify the incarcerating agency.

Field.description: The institution where the supervised person was incarcerated.

Field.description: The name of the person associated to this record.

Field.name: OriginatingAgencyORI
Field.description: A number assigned by NCIC to identify an agency

Field.name: AdditionalOffenseIndicator
Field.description: indicates whether any further charges are specified

Field.name: AddressCounty
Field.description: county in which the address is located

Field.name: AddressType
Field.description: Address type. See NCIC manual for listing.

Field.name: DNAIndicator
Field.description: indicator of whether DNA is available for inspection

Field.name: DNALocation
Field.description: freetext description of DNA storage location

Field.name: FBINumber
Field.description: a number assigned by the FBI to its criminal history records

Field.name: FraudulentOperatorLicenseStateCode
Field.description: Fraudulent state in which the operator license was issued

Field.name: FraudulentOperatorLicenseYear
Field.description: Fraudulent year in which the operator license expires

Field.name: FraudulentSocialSecurityNumber
Field.description: Fraudulent Social Security System identification number

Field.name: LicensePlateStateCode
Field.description: state in which the license was issued

Field.name: LicensePlateTypeCode
Field.description: a code which shows the type of use generally expected of a particular licensed vehicle

Field.name: LicensePlateYear
Field.description: year in which the license expires

Field.name: NotifyOriginatingAgency
Field.description: indicates if originating agency should be notified

Field.name: OperatorLicenseExpirationYear
Field.description: year in which the operator license expires

Field.name: OperatorLicenseStateCode
Field.description: state in which the operator license was issued

Field.name: OriginatingAgencyCaseNumber
Field.description: The entering agencys master case file number for a record

Field.name: OriginatingAgencyORI
Field.description: A number assigned by NCIC to identify an agency

Field.name: ScarsMarksTattoosCode
Field.description: scars, marks, or tattoos that identify person

Field.name: SocialSecurityNumber
Field.description: the person's Social Security System identification number

Field.name: VehicleIdentificationNumber
Field.description: the manufacturer's assigned vehicle identification number

Field.name: VehicleYear
Field.description: year that the vehicle was built

Field.name: FraudulentName
Field.description: The Fraudulent name of the person associated to this record.

Field.name: MiscellaneousNumber
Field.description: A supplemental identification number issued to the person by a governmental entity.

Field.description: An field used as a personal identifier number denoting the person's drivers license number.

Field.description: Fair market value (in whole dollars) of the item when it was recovered

Field.name: Extradition
Field.description: Extradition Code; see NCIC code manual

Field.description: Hit results, see NCC code manual

Field.name: NCICNumber
Field.description: A number assigned by the NCIC computer to each NCIC record

Field.name: OriginatingAgencyCaseNumber
Field.description: The entering agencys master case file number for a record

Field.name: OriginatingAgencyORI
Field.description: A number assigned by NCIC to identify an agency

Field.name: OtherRecoveredPropertyValue
Field.description: Fair market value (in whole dollars) of the item recovered in addition to the item that is the subject of the record

Field.name: PersonRecordRemovalReason
Field.description: reason why this record was removed

Field.name: PropertyRecoveredValue
Field.description: Fair market value (in whole dollars) of the item when it was recovered

Field.name: RecoveringAgencyCaseNumber
Field.description: The master case record of the recovering, locating or clearing agency

Field.name: AdditionalOffenseIndicator
Field.description: indicates whether any further charges are specified

Field.name: AddressCounty
Field.description: county in which the address is located

Field.name: AddressType
Field.description: Address type. See NCIC manual for listing.

Field.name: DNAIndicator
Field.description: indicator of whether DNA is available for inspection

Field.name: DNALocation
Field.description: freetext description of DNA storage location

Field.name: FBINumber
Field.description: a number assigned by the FBI to its criminal history records

Field.name: FraudulentOperatorLicenseStateCode
Field.description: Fraudulent state in which the operator license was issued

Field.name: FraudulentOperatorLicenseYear
Field.description: Fraudulent year in which the operator license expires

Field.name: FraudulentSocialSecurityNumber
Field.description: Fraudulent Social Security System identification number

Field.name: LicensePlateStateCode
Field.description: state in which the license was issued

Field.name: LicensePlateTypeCode
Field.description: a code which shows the type of use generally expected of a particular licensed vehicle

Field.name: LicensePlateYear
Field.description: year in which the license expires

Field.name: ModifiedOriginatingAgencyORI
Field.description: Modified number assigned by NCIC to identify an agency

Field.name: NCICNumber
Field.description: A number assigned by the NCIC computer to each NCIC record

Field.name: NotifyOriginatingAgency
Field.description: indicates if originating agency should be notified

Field.name: OperatorLicenseExpirationYear
Field.description: year in which the operator license expires

Field.name: OperatorLicenseStateCode
Field.description: state in which the operator license was issued

Field.name: OriginatingAgencyCaseNumber
Field.description: The entering agencys master case file number for a record

Field.name: OriginatingAgencyCaseNumber2
Field.description: Modifiedy entering agencys master case file number for a record

Field.name: OriginatingAgencyORI
Field.description: A number assigned by NCIC to identify an agency

Field.name: ScarsMarksTattoosCode
Field.description: scars, marks, or tattoos that identify person

Field.name: SocialSecurityNumber
Field.description: the person's Social Security System identification number

Field.name: VehicleIdentificationNumber
Field.description: the manufacturer's assigned vehicle identification number

Field.name: VehicleYear
Field.description: year that the vehicle was built

Field.name: AddressCounty
Field.description: county in which the address is located

Field.name: AddressTypeCode
Field.description: Address type. See NCIC manual for listing.

Field.name: ImageNCICNumber
Field.description: A number assigned by the NCIC computer to each NCIC image record

Field.name: ImageTypeCode
Field.description: A type code assigned to each NCIC image record

Field.name: LicensePlateStateCode
Field.description: state in which the license was issued

Field.name: LicensePlateTypeCode
Field.description: a code which shows the type of use generally expected of a particular licensed vehicle

Field.name: LicensePlateYear
Field.description: year in which the license expires

Field.name: NCICNumber
Field.description: A number assigned by the NCIC computer to each NCIC record

Field.name: OperatorLicenseStateCode
Field.description: state in which the operator license was issued

Field.name: OperatorLicenseYear
Field.description: year in which the operator license expires

Field.description: year that the vehicle was built

Field.description: A number assigned by the NCIC computer to each NCIC image record

Field.description: A type code assigned to each NCIC image record

Field.description: state in which the license was issued

Field.description: year in which the license expires

ResponseType.description: NCIC Violent Gang Or Terrorist Response
